headline: SoCalGas Employees Volunteer Across Southern California, Providing 1,100+ Volunteer Hours to Help Families Access Essential Resources
summary: Southern California Gas Co. (SoCalGas), a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE: SRE), today announced that employees dedicated more than 1,100 volunteer hours in May—equivalent to over 27 full-time workweeks—through its Glad to be of service® initiative. Spanning 38 cities and nine counties, these efforts strengthened local communities and helped connect families to resources that can reduce everyday costs—including food assistance, clothing and workforce programs.
